title: Commander
description: A mod that revamps BTA's command system
body:
*This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for* Better than Adventure!*, a heavily modified version of* Minecraft *b1.7.3!*

For more information, join the Discord server provided on this project's page.

# Commander
**Commander** adds [Brigadier](https://github.com/Mojang/brigadier) to *[Better than Adventure!](https://bta.miraheze.org/Main_Page)*.

![An example of the mod.](https://github.com/Pedro270707/commander-bta/assets/89267077/b6877ec9-e8e5-4b38-a508-beb123965329)
